full_text:
Chen Qian (Xiuyuan) 陳騫 (休淵)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Qian (陳騫), styledXiuyuan (休淵). A key Wei officer in the suppression of Zhuge Dan. Brigadier General of Jin. Chen Qian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Chen Qian lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
